productDisplayName: Puma Women Body Train Black Slipper
description: puma has made it even easier to get Fit. These stylish BioRide sandals have a curved sole designed to give your legs an extra workout when you walk. The textured footbed gives excellent grip while the toe thong in leather will ensure a comfortable fit to your foot. Upper Thong straps in black leather and purple fabric with embossed decoration and padded inner Leather toe thong Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and offer added comfort and style Dimpled footbed for all-day comfort and grip puma cat logo on the footbed Outsole Durable rubber outsole for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
